sections.title: If the player has not yet asked about the crew

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello! What brings you here?

lines.speaker: Zombie pirate
lines.text: I'm here to guard this ship from any scurvy dogs darin' to loot her cargo.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How did your ship end up here?

lines.speaker: Zombie pirate
lines.text: Arr, 'tis a woeful tale.

lines.speaker: Zombie pirate
lines.text: Me hearties and I were enjoying a bit o' grog when we espied a group of landlubbers fightin' on the shore. 'Twas such an exciting battle that our navigator forgot to watch for the rocks.

lines.speaker: Zombie pirate
lines.text: Now we've run aground, as ye can see.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where's the rest of your crew?

lines.speaker: Zombie pirate
lines.text: They're searchin' for booty at that temple to the west.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Will they return to the ship?

lines.speaker: Zombie pirate
lines.text: They best do! That scurvy lot keep fillin' their lockers with loot and sneakin' off without swappin' places!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you really want to go to the temple? I've heard the mages there have some really annoying spells.

lines.speaker: Zombie pirate
lines.text: Nothin' we can't handle! We've a way of stoppin' their tricksy teleports.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How can a group of mindless zombies invent a counter to magic?

lines.speaker: Zombie pirate
lines.text: What we lack in brains, we make up for in gold! We found us a landlubber willin' to share their knowledge... for a price.

lines.speaker: Zombie pirate
lines.text: They wrote us down a spell on some magic scrolls. All we 'ave to do is read one, and then we're properly anchored! Those mages can't teleport us anywhere!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wow, I'm actually impressed. Do you think your friends at the temple will lend me one?

lines.speaker: Zombie pirate
lines.text: Naw, they're too busy fightin' to talk to the likes of ye. Besides, we stash all our spare scrolls in these lockers for safekeepin'.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I take a scroll from a locker, then?

lines.speaker: Zombie pirate
lines.text: Ye'll need a key for that, matey! One of the crew should 'ave one.

lines.speaker: Zombie pirate
lines.text: And when ye see 'em, tell 'em it's their turn to keep watch!

lines.speaker: Zombie pirate
lines.text: There be plenty o' loot in them lockers, matey. Don't expect to find a scroll right away.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks. I'd say 'see you around', but I sort of hope I don't.

lines.speaker: Zombie pirate
lines.text: Aye, the feelin's mutual.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Goodbye, I hope your crew comes back soon.

lines.speaker: Zombie pirate
lines.text: Arr, me too matey.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Goodbye.

lines.speaker: Zombie pirate
lines.text: Bye, matey.

sections.title: If the player has learnt about the crew but not yet asked about the temple

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you really want to go to the temple? I've heard the mages there have some really annoying spells.

lines.speaker: Zombie pirate
lines.text: Nothin' we can't handle! We've a way of stoppin' their tricksy teleports.

lines.speaker: Zombie pirate
lines.text: Arr, I've still not seen any of my crew.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh dear, how strange.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you tell if I've used the Teleport anchoring scroll?

lines.speaker: Zombie pirate
lines.text: Aye, I can tell by the cut of your jib that ye haven't yet read the Teleport anchoring scroll.

lines.speaker: Zombie pirate
lines.text: Aye, I can tell by the cut of your jib that you've read the Teleport anchoring scroll.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How many times have I opened your lockers?

lines.speaker: Zombie pirate
lines.text: Ye've never done it even once!

lines.speaker: Zombie pirate
lines.text: Ye've done it once, and once only.

lines.speaker: Zombie pirate
lines.text: Ye've done it [#] times.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll leave you to wait for your crew.

lines.speaker: Zombie pirate
lines.text: I can tell by the cut of your jib that ye haven't yet read the Teleport anchoring scroll, and ye've never opened our lockers.

lines.speaker: Zombie pirate
lines.text: I can tell by the cut of your jib that ye haven't yet read the Teleport anchoring scroll, and ye've opened our lockers once, and once only.

lines.speaker: Zombie pirate
lines.text: I can tell by the cut of your jib that ye haven't yet read the Teleport anchoring scroll, though ye've opened our lockers [#] times.

lines.speaker: Zombie pirate
lines.text: I can tell by the cut of your jib that you've read the Teleport anchoring scroll, but ye've never opened our lockers.

lines.speaker: Zombie pirate
lines.text: I can tell by the cut of your jib that you've read the Teleport anchoring scroll, and ye've opened our lockers once, and once only.

lines.speaker: Zombie pirate
lines.text: I can tell by the cut of your jib that you've read the Teleport anchoring scroll, and ye've opened our lockers [#] times.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Still here?

lines.speaker: Zombie pirate
lines.text: I've not seen any of my crew yet.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I wonder why.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you tell if I've used the Teleport anchoring scroll?

lines.speaker: Zombie pirate
lines.text: Aye, I can tell by the cut of your jib that ye haven't yet read the Teleport anchoring scroll.

lines.speaker: Zombie pirate
lines.text: Aye, I can tell by the cut of your jib that you've read the Teleport anchoring scroll.
